title: Precise RVs and Stellar Magnetic Field Measurements via Least-Squares Deconvolution
author: Lienhard, Florian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: To push the radial velocity (RV) exoplanet detection threshold, it is crucial to find more reliable RV extraction methods and to get more reliable activity indicators. Here, we present the Multi-Mask Least-Squares Deconvolution (MM-LSD) RV extraction pipeline and an extension thereof that allows to simultaneously extract a proxy of the unsigned magnetic flux from Zeeman splitting in Stokes I spectra.
steps_raw: To push the radial velocity (RV) exoplanet detection threshold, it is crucial to find more reliable RV extraction methods and to get more reliable activity indicators. Here, we present the Multi-Mask Least-Squares Deconvolution (MM-LSD) RV extraction pipeline and an extension thereof that allows to simultaneously extract a proxy of the unsigned magnetic flux from Zeeman splitting in Stokes I spectra.
